headline: AI Play Datadog Nears A Buy Point On Big Money's Appetite For 'Observability' Technology
summary: Datadog's enterprise software is in demand, and that's driven its stock closer to a buy point and outperformance of the S&P 500.

headline: Datadog Named a Leader in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ For Observability Platforms For Sixth Consecutive Year
summary: Positioned highest for Ability to Execute among all vendors evaluatedNEW YORK, July 15, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Datadog, Inc. (NASDAQ: DDOG), the leading AI-powered observability and security platform, today announced it has been named a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Observability Platforms, 2026. This is the sixth consecutive year Gartner has positioned Datadog as a Leader in the Magic Quadrant. Datadog was positioned highest in Ability to Execute in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant

headline: Critical Cloud and Tarian Labs Launch Continuous Runtime Security Validation for Fintech firms
summary: CARDIFF, UK / ACCESS Newswire / July 15, 2026 / Critical CloudandTarian Labstoday announced a strategic alliance to deliver Continuous Runtime Security Validation, a joint service that gives fintech firms continuous proof that production is secure, ...
